name: Ya Ya Choral
description: '''Ya Ya Choral''' was a [[Sydney, Australia|Sydney]] band active in the 1980s and early 90s. Though a synthesizer-based three-piece when it began, the group later became a [[hard rock]] five-piece, and played in both inner-city and outer suburban venues. The hard rock version of the group toured [[Britain]]. A third iteration of the group, reduced to a duo, reinvented itself as a [[Pop music|pop]] band in the early 1990s.
